item.title: 174 Vulnerabilities Targeted by RondoDox Botnet
item.dc:creator: Ionut Arghire
item.description:
The botnet has increased its activity, peaking at 15,000 exploitation attempts per day, and taking a more targeted approach.

The post 174 Vulnerabilities Targeted by RondoDox Botnet appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: Google, Meta, Microsoft Among Signatories of Pact to Combat Scams
item.dc:creator: Eduard Kovacs
item.description:
Several major tech and retail companies have signed an industry accord against online scams and fraud.

The post Google, Meta, Microsoft Among Signatories of Pact to Combat Scams appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: Tracebit Raises $20M for Cloud-Native Deception Technology
item.dc:creator: Ionut Arghire
item.description:
The company plans to scale its products, expand to new markets, and grow its marketing and engineering teams.

The post Tracebit Raises $20M for Cloud-Native Deception Technology appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: CISA Flags Year-Old Wing FTP Vulnerability as Exploited
item.dc:creator: Ionut Arghire
item.description:
Tracked as CVE-2025-47813, the flaw leads to the disclosure of the full local installation path of the application.

The post CISA Flags Year-Old Wing FTP Vulnerability as Exploited appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: AI, APIs and DDoS Collide in New Era of Coordinated Cyberattacks
item.dc:creator: Kevin Townsend
item.description:
Akamai warns that Layer 7 DDoS, API abuse and AI-powered attacks are merging into coordinated, multi-vector campaigns that are harder to detect and defend against.

The post AI, APIs and DDoS Collide in New Era of Coordinated Cyberattacks appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: Oracle EBS Hack: Only 4 Corporate Giants Still Silent on Potential Impact
item.dc:creator: Eduard Kovacs
item.description:
Broadcom, Bechtel, Estée Lauder, and Abbott Technologies are the only major companies that have yet to issue a public statement. 

The post Oracle EBS Hack: Only 4 Corporate Giants Still Silent on Potential Impact appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: Security Firm Executive Targeted in Sophisticated Phishing Attack
item.dc:creator: Ionut Arghire
item.description:
The attackers used a DKIM-signed phishing email, trusted redirect infrastructure, compromised servers, and Cloudflare-protected phishing pages.

The post Security Firm Executive Targeted in Sophisticated Phishing Attack appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: China-Linked Hackers Hit Asian Militaries in Patient Espionage Operation
item.dc:creator: Ionut Arghire
item.description:
The state-sponsored hackers deployed custom tools and stayed dormant in the compromised environments for months.

The post China-Linked Hackers Hit Asian Militaries in Patient Espionage Operation appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: Threat Actor Targeting VPN Users in New Credential Theft Campaign
item.dc:creator: Ionut Arghire
item.description:
Storm-2561 is distributing fake VPN clients through SEO poisoning, deploying trojans, and stealing login information.

The post Threat Actor Targeting VPN Users in New Credential Theft Campaign appeared first on SecurityWeek.

item.title: ForceMemo: Python Repositories Compromised in GlassWorm Aftermath
item.dc:creator: Ionut Arghire
item.description:
Hundreds of GitHub accounts were accessed using credentials stolen in the VS Code GlassWorm campaign.

The post ForceMemo: Python Repositories Compromised in GlassWorm Aftermath appeared first on SecurityWeek.
